Home.visitorActivityTitle: Sign in to view your activity
Home.visitorActivityDescription: Activity history, chat with providers, payments, and reviews are only available to signed-in customers.
Home.professionalActivityTitle: You are currently in professional mode
Home.professionalActivityDescription: Use the professional portal to manage profile readiness, active services, coverage, and operational activity without mixing it with the customer flow.

Onboarding.heroHint: Choose the path that fits best.
Onboarding.accessPrompt: Choose the access flow you want to use first.
Onboarding.visitorDescription: Explore services and professionals without signing in.
Onboarding.customerDescription: Save activity, bookings, and family follow-up.
Onboarding.professionalDescription: Use a separate professional path so the customer flow stays focused.

CustomerAccess.alreadyCustomer: You are already in customer mode. Continue to the page you need.

general.title: Sign in as a customer to continue
general.description: Customer access is used for activity, bookings, family preferences, and care follow-up.

activity.title: Your activity requires a customer account
activity.description: Activity history, payments, chat, and reviews only appear after you sign in as a customer.

notifications.title: Customer notifications are only available for signed-in accounts
notifications.description: Schedule updates, professional replies, payment reminders, and family follow-up only appear for active customer accounts.

profile.title: Customer profile is separate from visitor mode
profile.description: Account details, family preferences, and account security are only available for signed-in customers.

booking.title: Booking is only for signed-in customers
booking.description: Sign in as a customer so schedules, payments, and care follow-up can be stored properly.

benefits.savedHistory: Activity and care status stay saved
benefits.familyContext: Chat and family context stay connected

errors.loginPhoneRequired: WhatsApp number is required for the login simulation.
errors.loginPasswordRequired: Password is required for the login simulation.
errors.registerNameRequired: Full name is required for the registration simulation.
errors.registerPhoneRequired: WhatsApp number is required for the registration simulation.

CustomerAccess.registerHelper: This form is still a frontend-only simulation. After submitting, the app will switch to customer mode without backend auth.
CustomerAccess.visitorDescription: Visitors can still explore services and professionals, but activity, booking, and customer profile are gated to this page.

professional.title: Professional access is separated from the customer app
professional.description: We separate the professional flow so customer navigation stays focused on discovery, booking, and family activity.

Notifications.title: Notifications
Notifications.heroTitle: Track customer updates without losing context
Notifications.heroDescriptionUnread: You still have {count} notifications to open so schedules, chat, and payments stay in sync.
Notifications.heroDescriptionClear: You are all caught up. Keep monitoring appointments and conversations from one place.

empty.title: No notifications match this filter
empty.description: Try switching back to all updates to review the latest schedule, payment, or professional message.

ProfessionalGateway.title: The professional portal is separated from the customer app
ProfessionalGateway.description: In this frontend simulation, the professional flow is intentionally not merged into the customer app so operational needs and family needs stay distinct.

capabilities.dashboardDescription: This area is better suited for practice schedules, service performance, and professional activity summaries.
capabilities.queueDescription: Incoming requests, approvals, and home-visit scheduling are better handled in a dedicated professional portal.
capabilities.separationDescription: Customers focus on finding care and follow-up. Professionals focus on operations, capacity, and SLA.

ProfessionalGateway.nextStepDescription: If you are a customer, go back to the customer path. If you only want to browse the catalog, continue as a visitor.

ProfessionalAccess.title: Enter the professional portal
ProfessionalAccess.description: This portal handles professional auth, dashboard work, and the public professional profile in one flow.

benefits.separation: Customer and professional flows stay separate

ProfessionalAccess.alreadyProfessional: You are already in professional mode. Open the dashboard to continue.
ProfessionalAccess.loginHelper: Use the demo WhatsApp number and password. If you forget the password, send a reset link to the same number.

language.title: Language
language.description: Keep the professional portal in the language you prefer.

ProfessionalAccess.profileSelectorHint: This demo profile links the auth flow, dashboard, and public professional profile together.

errors.loginPhoneRequired: WhatsApp number is required for the professional login simulation.
errors.loginPasswordRequired: Password is required for the professional login simulation.
errors.registerNameRequired: Full name is required for the professional registration simulation.
errors.registerPhoneRequired: WhatsApp number is required for the professional registration simulation.
errors.registerCredentialRequired: STR / license number is required for the professional registration simulation.

forgotPassword.title: Reset professional password
forgotPassword.description: This is a frontend simulation. Enter the professional WhatsApp number to receive a password reset link and continue the login flow.
forgotPassword.success: A demo password reset link was sent to that WhatsApp number.
forgotPassword.error: Enter a WhatsApp number before sending the reset link.

ProfessionalAccess.registerHelper: After registering, you will go straight to the professional profile to start managing the portal. The connected public profile focus is: {category}.
ProfessionalAccess.separationTitle: Customer and professional paths stay separate
ProfessionalAccess.separationDescription: Customers focus on discovery and booking. Professionals focus on readiness, services, coverage, and operations.

notifications.title: Professional notifications
notifications.heroDescriptionUnread: You still have {count} updates to review so inbound requests, operational readiness, and service schedules stay organized.
notifications.heroDescriptionClear: All professional updates are read. Use this screen to keep request-board and operational reminders in one place.
notifications.emptyDescription: Switch back to all updates to review the latest request-board activity and operational reminders.

items.newRequestBody: {service} for {area} just came in. Review the client need and send an initial response before the queue slips.
items.quotedRequestBody: {client}'s {service} case is already in the quoted stage. Recheck pricing, proof, and response expectations before the next follow-up.
items.scheduledRequestBody: {client} is already scheduled for {service}. Keep the visit details, reminders, and handoff channel ready.
items.completedRequestBody: {service} for {client} is completed. Review the customer summary and internal notes before considering the case fully wrapped.
items.servicesMissingTitle: No active services are visible yet
items.servicesMissingBody: Activate at least one service so customers can see pricing, duration, and booking flow directly from your public profile.
items.featuredServiceTitle: No featured service has been selected
items.featuredServiceBody: Choose one featured service so the dashboard summary and public profile have a clear primary offer.
items.acceptingPausedTitle: New client intake is currently paused
items.acceptingPausedBody: The public profile is still visible, but new requests will not come in. Review the coverage settings if you want to reopen intake.
items.coverageMissingTitle: Coverage area is not configured yet
items.coverageMissingBody: Add at least one coverage area so home-visit requests and practice location data stay consistent across the portal.
items.reviewPendingTitle: Profile submission is waiting for admin review
items.reviewPendingBody: Your onboarding checklist is already submitted. Track the review status here while waiting for approval or revision notes.
items.reviewChangesRequestedBody: Open the onboarding summary, fix the flagged sections, and resubmit the profile so publishing can continue.
items.reviewVerifiedTitle: Verification passed and publishing is ready
items.reviewVerifiedBody: The admin review is complete. Publish the professional profile when you are ready to go live in the catalog.

draft.title: Profile is still inactive
draft.description: Complete the required setup so the profile can be submitted for admin review.

ready_for_review.title: Ready to submit for admin review
ready_for_review.description: All blocking onboarding items are complete. Submit the profile when you are ready.

submitted.title: Waiting for admin review
submitted.description: The profile is submitted and still hidden from the public catalog until the review finishes.

changes_requested.title: Revisions are required before publishing
changes_requested.description: Review the admin note, fix the flagged sections, and submit the profile again.

verified.title: Verified and ready to publish
verified.description: Admin approval is complete. Publish the profile when you want to go live.

published.title: Profile is live
published.description: The professional profile is already visible in the public catalog.

onboarding.submitSuccess: Profile was submitted for admin review.
onboarding.validationNotice: Complete all blocking onboarding items before submitting to admin.
onboarding.demoRevisionSuccess: Demo review moved the profile to revision requested.
onboarding.demoVerifySuccess: Demo review moved the profile to verified.
onboarding.publishSuccess: Profile was published to the catalog.

requests.title: Recent activity
requests.summaryDescription: New requests open by default so inbound work is easier to triage. Switch stages to review quoted, scheduled, and completed cases with their supporting proof.

evidence.title: Supporting evidence
evidence.description: Sensitive status updates should include a customer-facing summary and proof so the change can be audited by both sides.
evidence.helper: Add the summary shared to the customer, then attach proof such as a quote, schedule confirmation, invoice, recap, or other supporting link.
evidence.historyEmpty: No stage update has been saved yet. This request is still waiting for the first professional response.
evidence.empty: No supporting evidence has been attached for this status yet.

requests.preliveTitle: Requests are locked until the profile goes live
requests.preliveDescription: Finish onboarding, submit the profile to admin, and publish it first. After that, incoming requests will start appearing here.
requests.emptyDescription: Switch to another stage or wait for new customer activity to show up here.

errors.invalidTransition: This request can only move to the next valid stage.
errors.paymentPending: The schedule cannot be locked before the customer payment is completed.
errors.customerSummaryRequired: Write the customer-facing summary before saving this status update.
errors.evidenceRequired: Add an internal note or an evidence link before saving this status update.
errors.evidenceNoteRequired: Add an internal completion note before marking this request as completed.

services.title: Services visible to customers
services.description: Choose from existing service templates, then complete pricing, duration, modes, and booking flow shown in the customer catalog.
services.featuredHint: The featured service is prioritized in the public profile and dashboard summary.
services.availabilityNoteTitle: Booking days and times are managed once from the Booking Hours tab.
services.availabilityNoteDescription: All offline services read the same professional-wide availability so operations stay cleaner and do not branch per service.
services.archiveSuccess: {service} was hidden from the public catalog.
services.activateSuccess: {service} was added from the template library.

availability.title: Shared booking hours
availability.heroTitle: One schedule for every offline service
availability.heroDescription: Set booking days and times in one place. Every home-visit and onsite service will read this shared professional availability when a customer chooses a slot.
availability.modeSectionDescription: Split home-visit and onsite hours when their operations need different booking windows.
availability.modeSummaryEmpty: There are no active days for this mode yet.
availability.emptyTitle: No schedule for this mode yet
availability.emptyDescription: Add a day first, then fill the available times so customers only see slots that are truly open for booking.
availability.emptySlotState: There are no times for this day yet. Add slots so this mode is ready for every offline service.
availability.editorDescription: Changes here apply to every offline service that supports the selected mode.

portfolio.title: Portfolio and proof of work
portfolio.description: Curate case studies, outcomes, and visual assets so customers can understand the quality and context behind your work.
portfolio.addSuccess: A new portfolio draft was added.
portfolio.deleteSuccess: Portfolio was removed from the simulation.
portfolio.galleryDescription: Add assets that strengthen customer trust in your practice, services, and outcomes.
portfolio.galleryAddSuccess: A new gallery asset was added.
portfolio.galleryFeaturedHint: The featured asset will appear first in the public gallery.
portfolio.galleryDeleteSuccess: Gallery asset was removed from the simulation.

coverage.title: Service coverage
coverage.scopeDescription: Keep the active areas and service reach tidy so incoming demand matches your real operations.
coverage.availabilityDescription: Actual booking times are managed in Booking Hours. Coverage only keeps location, reach, and intake rules aligned.
coverage.operationsDescription: Monitor new-client intake and the coverage center from one place.
coverage.emptyPracticeAddress: The practice address is not filled in yet.
coverage.emptyPublicBio: A public bio has not been added yet.
coverage.emptyAreaSelection: There are no active areas yet. Add coverage areas so the profile is ready to receive matching requests.
coverage.emptyModeSelection: No active service modes are ready yet. Enable at least one active service in Services.
coverage.emptyAvailability: No active services are ready yet. Activate services first, then define shared booking hours from Booking Hours.
coverage.serviceSettingsTitle: Active service modes live in Services, while booking days and hours live in Booking Hours.
coverage.serviceSettingsHint: If booking hours need to change, update them from Booking Hours. Coverage only reflects the live result.

switches.acceptingDescription: Turn this off if the profile should stay visible but stop taking new requests.
switches.instantDescription: Enable this if instant bookings can go through without manual review.

coverage.validationMessage: Choose at least one coverage area before saving. Service modes are managed in Services and time slots are managed in Booking Hours.
coverage.saveSuccess: Coverage and operational settings were updated.

quickActions.dashboardDescription: Open requests, readiness, and the main professional summary.
quickActions.publicProfileDescription: Preview the page customers will see before they book.

language.title: App language
language.description: Choose the display language that feels most comfortable when managing the professional account.
language.compactDescription: Use the language that feels easiest

menu.accountDescription: Identity, contact number, public bio, and response target.
menu.securityDescription: Change the password or send a reset link when access is blocked.

account.title: Professional account details
account.description: Keep identity details, the public bio, and the response target clear so customers understand the profile quickly.
account.profileCompletionHint: The more complete this profile is, the more ready the public profile and operations dashboard become.

security.title: Account security
security.description: Manage the professional demo password and keep a reset path ready whenever the password is forgotten.
security.success: The demo professional password was updated.
security.resetDescription: Send a reset link to the professional WhatsApp number so access can be restored without changing profile data.
security.resetSuccess: The demo password reset link was sent.

errors.newPasswordWeak: The new password does not meet the minimum security rules.
errors.confirmMismatch: The password confirmation does not match the new password.
errors.resetPhoneRequired: Enter the WhatsApp number for the reset flow first.

Professional.selectionResumeEmptyDescription: Tap one service from the list to open the dialog and start configuring your booking choice.
Professional.selectionResumeModeDescription: The service is already chosen. Continue by selecting the mode that fits best.
Professional.selectionResumeScheduleDescription: The mode is already chosen. Pick the visit day and time so the booking is ready to request.
Professional.selectionResumeReadyDescription: The booking summary is complete. Review the details once more and continue with the booking button below.
Professional.serviceSectionHelper: Choose one service first, then configure its mode and schedule in the dialog. After that you can continue with the booking button below.
Professional.selectionStepConfigure: Set the mode and schedule if needed
Professional.selectionStepBook: Request booking once the choice is ready
Professional.selectionEmptyTitle: Choose one service to start booking
Professional.selectionEmptyDescription: The list below shows every service this professional offers. Tap one service to open its details and configure the booking.
Professional.serviceDialogDescription: Choose an available mode, then set the schedule if this service requires a visit.
Professional.scheduleRequired: Choose a visit time before continuing with an offline booking.
Professional.offlineScheduleRequired: Choose a visit day and time before continuing the offline booking.
Professional.noFilteredServices: No services match the current filters.
Professional.noFilteredServicesHint: Try another search term or reset the filters to see more services.

requestUpdates.title: Your latest request with {professional}
requestUpdates.description: This status is shared by the provider so you can track quotes, scheduling, and completion more transparently.
requestUpdates.submittedSummary: Your request has been sent and is waiting for provider review.
requestUpdates.emptySummary: The provider has not added a customer-facing summary for this stage yet.

Explore.title: {professional}s
Explore.tryAdjusting: Try adjusting your filters or search term.
Explore.locationPointHint: Enter coordinates or use your current location. The nearest area will be derived from this coordinate point.
Explore.invalidCoordinates: Invalid coordinates. Use latitude -90..90 and longitude -180..180.
Explore.locationBrowserUnsupported: This browser does not support location detection.
Explore.locationPermissionDenied: Location permission was denied. Enable it in your browser.
Explore.locationUnavailable: Location is currently unavailable from this device.
Explore.locationFetchFailed: Failed to detect the current location.
Explore.locationResolveFailed: Failed to map coordinates to mock location details.
Explore.locationDummyHint: Location detail is currently mocked in the frontend. It can be replaced by a reverse geocoding API later without changing the UI.

Appointments.title: Activity
Appointments.trySearching: Try searching or book a new service.

ServiceDetail.noProfessionals: No professionals currently provide this service.

careHub.title: Your family profile and care preferences
careHub.description: Manage account details, family support, and follow-up rhythms so care feels more personal, organized, and safe.
careHub.focusFallback: No special focus has been saved yet.
careHub.activeAppointment: {service} with {professional} is currently part of your follow-up flow.
careHub.noActiveAppointment: There is no active session yet. You can still prepare your preferences so the next session feels faster and more tailored.

quickActions.activityDescription: Review active sessions, progress, and family follow-up.
quickActions.exploreDescription: Discover professionals and follow-up services that fit home needs.

professionalCard.title: Professional Portal Stays Separate
professionalCard.description: If you are a professional, use this CTA to reach a dedicated area so the customer flow does not get mixed.

menu.languageDescription: Switch between Bahasa Indonesia and English anytime.
menu.accountDescription: Primary contact, care focus, and family support.
menu.securityDescription: New password and account privacy controls.

preferences.title: Care Preferences
preferences.description: Align services with family communication, visit modes, and after-care reminders.
preferences.familyUpdatesEnabled: Schedule summaries and follow-ups are shared.
preferences.familyUpdatesDisabled: Updates stay with the primary account only.
preferences.remindersEnabled: Follow-up reminders stay active for the family.
preferences.privacyEnabled: Sensitive information is limited to the main account.
preferences.privacyDisabled: Sensitive notes may appear in the family summary.

accountSheet.title: Account Details
accountSheet.description: Complete your identity, care focus, and family contact so follow-up stays aligned.
accountSheet.focusPlaceholder: Example: home care, family education, routine follow-up
accountSheet.supportDescription: Add the one contact who is most relevant when care coordination is needed.
accountSheet.familyUpdatesToggle: Share schedule updates with family support
accountSheet.privacyToggle: Keep sensitive notes for the main account only

errors.supportContactIncomplete: Complete the family support name, relationship, and phone number.

securitySheet.title: Change Password
securitySheet.description: Account security matters to keep family data and care history private.
securitySheet.helperDescription: Use a password that you can remember while still keeping access protected.

errors.newPasswordWeak: The new password does not meet the security rules.
errors.confirmMismatch: The password confirmation does not match.

about.title: {appName} is built for care that feels close, safe, and continuous.
about.description: The profile page is more than an identity screen. It becomes the family control center for care preferences, caregiver support, and secure access.
about.continuityDescription: Brings home care, online follow-up, and service activity together so mothers and families do not start from zero in every session.
about.familyDescription: Creates room for a support contact, shared updates, and realistic check-in rhythms at home.
about.trustDescription: Builds trust through stronger passwords, control over sensitive information, and a transparent experience.
about.researchLabel: this direction follows principles of continuous postnatal care, individualized care, and family support.

booking.online: Online booking created. Continue to scheduling and payment.
booking.homeVisit: Home care request submitted. The system will check coverage and confirm the schedule.
booking.onsite: Visit reservation created. Choose an available appointment slot.

alerts.chatUnavailable: Chat is only available for active activities.

appointment.welcomeTemplate: Hello, how can I help you with your {serviceName} reservation?

statusBanners.requested: The provider is reviewing your request. We will notify you as soon as it is approved.
statusBanners.paid: Payment received. The provider will follow the selected schedule.
statusBanners.confirmed: Your schedule is confirmed. Please prepare the location and anything relevant before the session starts.
statusBanners.inService: The session is in progress. You can still send a message if anything else is needed.
statusBanners.cancelled: This reservation has been cancelled. You can book a new schedule anytime.
statusBanners.rejected: This request was declined. Try another slot or a different available provider.
statusBanners.expired: This request expired because the payment was not completed in time.

home.emptyStateDescription: Use the service catalog to start a new flow from discovery to booking.

review.title: Leave a Review
review.helperText: Your review helps us improve service quality.
review.reviewPlaceholder: The service was very friendly and professional...
review.successAlert: Review submitted successfully. Thank you for your feedback.

Integration.title: Backend Contract + Realtime Example
Integration.description: This page demonstrates REST access through the shared SDK generated from the backend OpenAPI document, plus realtime chat over WebSocket.
Integration.restError: Failed to load backend data. Make sure the backend is running on localhost:8080.
Integration.emptyMessages: No live messages yet. Send one message to verify the websocket flow.
Integration.messagePlaceholder: Send a live message to the backend demo thread...
Integration.socketError: WebSocket connection failed. Verify the backend websocket endpoint and allowed origin.
Integration.noteContract: The OpenAPI document is exported from backend route registration, not hand-maintained in frontend.
Integration.noteSdk: Frontend integration uses the shared SDK package so fetch usage stays typed at development time.
Integration.noteWebsocket: Realtime chat is intentionally separated from OpenAPI because websocket transport needs its own event contract.
